phase: Phase PKG: No-prerequisite packaging (owner-decision card Option A)
task: Task 1 - author Option-A frozen-binary build infrastructure (PyInstaller spec + CI release matrix + gate + docs)
owner_decision_status: OPEN - this authors the RECOMMENDED Option A recipe without building or publishing; owner A/B/C choice not pre-empted
trigger_context: Owner-silence default after 4 consecutive owner-pivot-blocked windows; MODEL_DEV_TASK_PROMPT.md pointer: 'If silent again, default = resume Phase IGUI / packaging (auto-runnable)'. Packaging is the explicit residual named by PHASE_IGUI_TASK9_PHASE_SUMMARY.
what_was_added: packaging/actuarial_gui.spec - PyInstaller onefile spec; entry=scripts/launch_offline_gui.py; bundles numpy/pandas/scipy + ui_app.html + ui_data.json + production_run/ + .claude-dev/GOVERNANCE_STORE.json + requirements-engine-lock.txt; console=True; upx=False

packaging/release.workflow.yml (template; install to .github/workflows/release.yml with a workflow-scope token) - 3-OS matrix (ubuntu/windows/macos); gated to workflow_dispatch + v* tags (NO branch-push trigger); installs pinned engine + pyinstaller==6.11.1; runs the gate; builds; smoke-tests with --self-test; uploads artifacts; tag build publishes a Release
scripts/build_phase_pkg_task1_validate.py - stdlib-only structural acceptance gate (also the CI pre-build step)
acceptance_criteria_preregistered: spec parses + targets the offline launcher + bundles only existing data paths
workflow is manual/tag only (never auto on branch push), 3-OS, runs gate, builds spec, smoke-tests binary with --self-test asserting localhost-only + engine_ready
ui_app.html byte-unchanged vs pinned baseline sha256 d82c65ec...; ui_data.json governed headline 39975.654628199336 still present
no model parameter change; no contract change; governance audit-chain integrity preserved

invariants.offline_guarantee: binary binds 127.0.0.1 only, no outbound call - identical to run-from-source

engine_pin.rationale: frozen numerical stack => governed headline reproducible per release

cannot_build_in_sandbox: No build toolchain + no outbound network + frozen binaries are not cross-built; the CI matrix performs the actual per-OS build. This cycle authors + structurally validates the recipe only.
residual_owner_infra_decisions: code signing / notarization certificate (Windows SmartScreen / macOS Gatekeeper)
antivirus false-positive handling for unsigned onefile bundles (UPX already disabled)
onedir fallback if a runner's scipy/BLAS hook needs it
whether to publish public release assets vs internal distribution
standard_references: PyInstaller manual - spec files, collect_all hooks, onefile vs onedir, scipy/numpy hidden imports
SOA ASOP 56 s.3.4-3.6 - model methodology/implementation documentation and reproducibility
SOA ASOP 41 - actuarial communications (reviewer-facing build/offline provenance)
delivery_note: The CI workflow is shipped as packaging/release.workflow.yml (a template) because the automated dev token lacks GitHub 'workflow' scope and cannot write under .github/workflows/. Install with: mkdir -p .github/workflows && cp packaging/release.workflow.yml .github/workflows/release.yml (from a checkout whose token has 'workflow' scope), then commit.
